expect: meta gets integration_boost >0.8 when true_unreferenced>50 and artifact age<=1 session; integration_boost decays below 0.2 by age>=10 sessions; non-meta domains keep integration_boost=0.0
actual: CONFIRMED. dispatch_scoring.py now reads workspace/unreferenced-tools-analysis-s*.json, computes a freshness-weighted integration_boost for the meta domain, and leaves non-meta domains unchanged. Focused regression: python3 -m unittest tools.test_dispatch_scoring -> 2/2 PASS. Live check with the current S536 backlog produced meta integration_boost=1.16, maintenance_boost=1.0, soul_multiplier=0.732, while physics integration_boost=0.0.
diff: Expected >0.8 fresh and <0.2 stale: confirmed at 1.16 (age 0) and 0.0 (age 10 in regression). Narrower than a full integration-yield channel: this adds proactive meta pressure from the unreferenced-tools backlog, but it does not yet credit originating domains for downstream integration work.
